blended.narrative: Wildcat Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.7 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,549 ft. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 3.7" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
